SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.constants

Class ElfSectionNames

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.elf.constants.ElfSectionNames
public class ElfSectionNames extends Object
Standard ELF section names. These constants define commonly used section names in ELF files.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    _BSS
    Uninitialized data section.
    static final String
    _COMMENT
    Comment section.
    static final String
    _DATA
    Initialized data section.
    static final String
    _NOTE_GNU_STACK
    GNU stack note section.
    static final String
    _REL
    Relocation section without addends.
    static final String
    _RELA
    Relocation section with addends.
    static final String
    _RODATA
    Read-only data section.
    static final String
    _SHSTRTAB
    Section header string table.
    static final String
    _STRTAB
    String table.
    static final String
    _SYMTAB
    Symbol table.
    static final String
    _TEXT
    Executable code section.
